context: User experiences unexpected twists — AI reveals something shocking, a friend announces a sudden life change, user discovers something about themselves, and random positive/negative surprises happen in the environment.

turns.user_sentence: You just told me my flight was canceled. I had no idea. What happened?
My brother just quit his job and moved to Japan. Out of nowhere!
I just checked my DNA results. I have a twin I never knew about.
A stray dog just walked into my office and sat on my chair. So random!
You found a $500 refund I didn't know about. Where did that come from?
My boss just gave me a promotion out of nowhere. I'm completely shocked.
I just realized I've been afraid of success my whole life. That's a shock.
The power went out during my presentation. Then the backup failed too.
You just told me my ex got married last week. I did not see that coming.
My best friend is moving across the country tomorrow. No warning at all.
I suddenly remembered a childhood memory I had completely repressed.
The vending machine gave me two snacks instead of one. Best surprise ever!
You said my favorite band is playing tonight. How did I not know this?
My neighbor just gave me their car for free. I'm still processing this.
I just realized I'm happier alone. That completely changes everything.
